title: Reimagining the mouse pointer with AI
summary: Google DeepMind has developed an AI-enhanced mouse pointer that understands what it points to and provides contextual significance. The system modernizes the decades-old pointer interface by adding AI-powered capabilities for improved user workflows across digital environments.
